headline: Eversource Energy Schedules First Quarter Earnings Call
summary: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON, April 16, 2026--Eversource Energy will host an earnings conference call with financial analysts on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss the company’s financial performance and other business updates for the first quarter of 2026.
